user.title: Connect to Seerr
user.description: Provide your Seerr URL and admin API key. Find the API key under Settings → General.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Seerr at the URL provided.

abort.already_configured: This Seerr instance is already configured.

init.title: User mapping
init.description: Map each Home Assistant user to a Seerr user. Suggestions are pre-filled.

data.web_url: Public Seerr URL (used for browser links)

search.name: Search Seerr
search.description: Search for movies or TV shows on Seerr.

request.name: Request media
request.description: Submit a request to Seerr for the caller's mapped user.

seasons.name: Seasons
seasons.description: TV only. Omit for all seasons.

user_override.name: User override
user_override.description: Admin only — override the auto-resolved Seerr user.

is_4k.name: 4K
is_4k.description: Submit as a 4K request. Requires Seerr to have a 4K Radarr/Sonarr server configured and the user to have 4K request permission.

title.name: Title
title.description: Optional display title; included in the haseerr_request_submitted event for logging.

approve_request.name: Approve request
approve_request.description: Approve a pending Seerr request by id.

decline_request.name: Decline request
decline_request.description: Decline a pending Seerr request by id.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason recorded with the decline.

user_quota.name: Get user quota
user_quota.description: Return Seerr's request quota for the caller's mapped user.

user_override.name: User override
user_override.description: Admin only — return quota for the specified Seerr user id instead of the caller.
